translationMethod.review: Codex source-faithfulness review with recorded overrides

notes: This is an unofficial Korean translation dataset.
Only source-validated OCR units were translated.
Unresolved OCR lines are excluded from translation body text.
Status reviewed means Codex-reviewed pilot translation; it is not final owner-approved public text.
Gemini raw outputs, auth details, and operational crop/image evidence are not included in this public export.
